description: WS connection pool management + event broadcasting

ws_handler.description: JWT validation before WebSocket upgrade, 401 on invalid token

register.description: Connection registration with DashMap insertion and broadcast subscription

unregister.description: Cleanup with presence-offline broadcast and empty broadcaster removal

broadcast_to_channel.description: Fan-out ServerEvent to channel subscribers with graceful no-receiver handling

notify_channel.description: Convenience wrapper for REST handlers to push WS events after DB insert

handle_socket.description: tokio::select! loop with WS recv, broadcast forwarding, and 15s/60s heartbeat

files_changed: src/error.rs (minimal fix: added ValidationError to Display impl)
